CONTENT.Club career: He was raised in the youth teams of Bologna and started playing for their Under-19 squad in the 2018–19 season.He made his debut for Bologna's senior squad on 25 November 2020 in a Coppa Italia game against Spezia. He made his Serie A debut on 5 December 2020 against Inter.On 26 August 2021, he was loaned to Serie C club Piacenza.On 30 June 2022, Rabbi signed a four-year contract with SPAL.
CONTENT.International career: He was first called up to represent his country in August 2018 for Under-18 team friendlies.

SUMMARY: Simone Rabbi (born 30 October 2001) is an Italian football player who plays as a forward for Serie C Group B club SPAL.
